title: Imperial patrol speeder (repulsortank)

{{Quote|The ''speeder's'' wrecked, Ben…but its ''gun crew's'' still firing! Those little guys will be ''slaughtered''!|Luke Skywalker, in reference to a disabled Imperial patrol speeder|<ref name="The Return of Ben Kenobi" />}}
The '''Imperial patrol speeder''' was a model of [[Hovertank/Legends|repulsortank]] used by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] and an [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] [[Obi-Wan Kenobi impersonator|impersonator]] [[Battle at the Iron Tower|encountered]] one while traveling to the [[Iron Tower]] on the [[planet]] [[Aridus/Legends|Aridus]].

==Characteristics==
{{Quote|The Imperials in that speeder aren't interested in anything but ''blasting'' on sight!|Luke Skywalker|<ref name="The Return of Ben Kenobi" />}}
A model of [[Hovertank/Legends|repulsortank]],<ref name="CSWE" /> the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] patrol [[Speeder/Legends|speeder]] was armed with a turret-mounted [[Laser cannon/Legends|laser cannon]] and eight ball-mounted [[Blaster cannon/Legends|blaster cannons]], two front-facing and three on either side of the vehicle, operated by a gun crew.<ref name="The Return of Ben Kenobi" /> The patrol [[Speeder/Legends|speeder's]] main [[Engine/Legends|thruster]] was its weak spot<ref name="CSWE" /> and the repulsortank would be rendered uncontrollable if it was damaged. In addition, if its [[Power cell/Legends|power cells]] were damaged, the vehicle would explode.<ref name="The Return of Ben Kenobi" />

==Role==
[[File:Chubbit_attack.jpg|thumb|left|300px|Chubbit rebels attack an Imperial patrol speeder]]
{{Quote|Ben…there are ''other'' defenses! We've been spotted by an ''Imperial patrol speeder''!|Luke Skywalker, to an Obi-Wan Kenobi impersonator|<ref name="The Return of Ben Kenobi" />}}
Imperial patrol speeder were used for patrol and defense.<ref name="The Return of Ben Kenobi" />

==History==
{{Quote|Lord Vader! Scanners show ''fighting'' nearby…two ''humans'' have joined Aridus locals attacking a patrol speeder.|An [[Imperial officer/Legends|Imperial officer]], to [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]]|<ref name="The Return of Ben Kenobi" />}}
During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], Imperial patrol speeders were used by the Galactic Empire to defend the [[Iron Tower]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Aridus/Legends|Aridus]]. In the [[Standard year/Legends|year]] [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]], one of these vehicles spotted and [[Battle at the Iron Tower|attacked]] [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] and an [[Obi-Wan Kenobi impersonator|Imperial]] [[Actor/Legends|impersonating]] [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] while they were approaching the Iron Tower. Its main thruster damaged was by several [[Chubbit]] [[Alliance to Restore the Republic|rebels]], though its [[Gunner/Legends|gunners]] were still able to fire its weapons. The imposter was then able to destroy the Imperial patrol speeder by touching [[Gender/Legends|his]] [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] to its [[Power cell/Legends|power cells]].<ref name="The Return of Ben Kenobi" />

==Behind the scenes==
The Imperial patrol speeder was originally created for the [[Star Wars Legends|''Star Wars'' Legends]] [[Star Wars (comic strip)|newspaper comic strip]] ''[[The Return of Ben Kenobi]]'', written by [[Archie Goodwin]] and penciled by [[Al Williamson]], which ran from [[May 17]] to [[July 25]], [[1982]].<ref name="The Return of Ben Kenobi" />

==Appearances==
*"[[The Return of Ben Kenobi]]" {{Reprint|The Return of Ben Kenobi}} {{1st}}
